overall.description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long dining tables, and students seated for a meal. Warm sunlight streams through large stained glass windows at the far end while a student walks through the foreground. The scene is rendered in a high-quality game engine with detailed stone architecture and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a magnificent gothic great hall filled with floating candles casting warm golden light over long dining tables where students are seated. Sunlight streams through a large stained glass window at the far end, illuminating the stone architecture. Midway through the clip, a student walks across the foreground from right to left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric view of a gothic great hall where warm interior light blends with distant sunlight. It begins with a wide perspective of the magnificent stone architecture, focusing on floating candles that cast a golden glow over long dining tables filled with seated students. As the camera lingers, the light from a large stained glass window at the far end streams inward to illuminate the vast space. The scene then shifts in focus as a student walks across the foreground from right to left, adding a sense of movement to the otherwise still and majestic environment.
